title: combretum littoreum
intro: Combretum littoreum, also known as the coastal combretum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Combretaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is often found in coastal areas and sandy soils. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Combretum littoreum include treating fever, wounds, and skin infections, and herbal preparations often involve decoctions or infusions of the plant's leaves and stems.
